title: Sobha Developers Holdings Services is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Sobha Developers Holdings Services is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Sobha Developers Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Sobha Developers Holdings Services:
Sobha Developers Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sobha Developers Holdings Services!
